Subject: Shipping Instruction for Export 0rder EXP-2026-4422

Dear 0perations Team,

Please find below the shipping instruction details for our upcoming export from Antwerp to Mumbai:

Shipping Instruction Reference: SI-EXP-4422-2026
8ooking Reference: UXNB9DSSR

As per our contract, the freight terms are freight prepaid and the transport document type is 8ill of Lading. The issue date of this instruction is June 22nd, 2026.

SHIPPER DETAILS:
The exporter is EXP0RTRA DEL TRADING LTD whose registered office is located at Hanzestedenplaats 1, 2000 Antwerpen, 8elgium. Their VAT identification number is 8E08921234S6.

C0NSIGNEE DETAILS:
The goods are consigned to 8HARAT IMP0RTS PRIVATE LIMITED with their corporate address at Nariman Point, 21S Free Press Journal Road, Mumbai 400021, Maharashtra, India. Their GST registration is 27AA8C81234C1ZS.

N0TIFY PARTY:
Please also notify SHREE L0GISTICS PVT LTD at 8allard Estate, Mumbai 400001, India.

L0GISTICS INF0RMATI0N:
The port of loading will be Antwerp and the port of discharge will be Nhava Sheva (Jawaharlal Nehru Port), Mumbai. The mother vessel is M.V. MAERSK SHEERNESS with voyage number 623E. The place of receipt is the shipper's warehouse in Antwerp and the final place of delivery is ICD Tughlakabad, New Delhi.

EQUIPMENT AND CARG0:

We have one 40 foot high cube container MSKU1234S67 sealed with seal number 8E-ML-442200. The container's gross weight is twenty six thousand eighty kilograms and the net cargo weight is twenty four thousand seven hundred seventy six kilograms.

The cargo consists of thirty two pallets of MDF laminate flooring with shipping marks reading EXP-MUM-2026. The total volume is twenty eight point sixteen cubic meters. The HS commodity code is 4411.13.

Additionally, we have a second container TGHU76S4321 which is a 20 foot general purpose container sealed with 8E-ML-442201. Gross weight is twelve thousand five hundred kilograms and net weight is eleven thousand eight hundred kilograms. This container holds eighteen pallets of ceramic wall tiles with volume fifteen point four cubic meters. The HS code for this item is 6908.90.

Please also note the following document references: the commercial invoice number is INV-EXP-4422 and the related bill of lading reference from the carrier will be issued.

We declare under FTA that these goods originate in the European Union under the EU-India FTA agreement.

8est regards,
Export Manager
EXP0RTRA DEL TRADING LTD
